Class RoleCheckActivity

android.app.Activity
androidx.core.app.ComponentActivity
androidx.activity.ComponentActivity
androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
com.example.codebase.RoleCheckActivity
All Implemented Interfaces:
androidx.activity.contextaware.ContextAware, androidx.activity.FullyDrawnReporterOwner, androidx.activity.OnBackPressedDispatcherOwner, androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultCaller, androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultRegistryOwner, androidx.appcompat.app.ActionBarDrawerToggle.DelegateProvider, androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatCallback, androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat.OnRequestPermissionsResultCallback, androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat.RequestPermissionsRequestCodeValidator, androidx.core.app.OnMultiWindowModeChangedProvider, androidx.core.app.OnNewIntentProvider, androidx.core.app.OnPictureInPictureModeChangedProvider, androidx.core.app.TaskStackBuilder.SupportParentable, androidx.core.content.OnConfigurationChangedProvider, androidx.core.content.OnTrimMemoryProvider, androidx.core.view.KeyEventDispatcher.Component, androidx.core.view.MenuHost, androidx.lifecycle.HasDefaultViewModelProviderFactory, androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleOwner, androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelStoreOwner, androidx.savedstate.SavedStateRegistryOwner
public class RoleCheckActivity extends androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
Invisible entry point activity, registered as MAIN/LAUNCHER.

Executes on every application launch without rendering any UI (themed with Theme.CodeBase.NoDisplay). Reads the device's registration state from

invalid reference 
SharedPreferences
and forwards it to WelcomeActivity via an
invalid reference 
Intent
extra, allowing WelcomeActivity to determine the correct post-role-selection route.

Launch flows:

  • First launch: RoleCheckActivity → WelcomeActivity → SplashActivity → MainActivity
  • Subsequent launches: RoleCheckActivity → WelcomeActivity → MainActivity

  • Field Details

    • PREFS_NAME

      public static final String PREFS_NAME
      Name of the
      invalid reference 
      SharedPreferences
      file shared across the application for storing session and registration state.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • KEY_REGISTERED

      public static final String KEY_REGISTERED
      invalid reference 
      SharedPreferences
      key whose boolean value indicates whether the device has completed first-run registration.
      • false (default) — first launch; onboarding flow will be triggered.
      • true — returning user; routed directly to the main screen.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • RoleCheckActivity

      public RoleCheckActivity()

  • Method Details

    • onCreate

      protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState)
      Reads registration state and immediately delegates to WelcomeActivity.

      No content view is set; this activity is intentionally invisible. It finishes itself after starting WelcomeActivity so it is removed from the back stack.

      Overrides:
      onCreate in class androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
      Parameters:
      savedInstanceState - Unused. No UI state is retained by this activity.
